## Description

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check` and `ruff format` pass
- [ ] `hassfest` passes
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Frontend built locally (`yarn build`) if frontend changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (for user-facing changes)
